stories.headline: Anthropic Files Lawsuit Against Pentagon's 'Supply Chain Risk' Designation
key_facts: Anthropic designated 'supply chain risk to national security'
All federal agencies ordered to cease use
DOD gets 6-month transition period
Anthropic refused: autonomous targeting optimization, surveillance filter removal, kill-chain integration without human override
Claude hit #1 on App Store after announcement
10 defense contractors dropping Claude, migrating to OpenAI
OpenAI signed identical Pentagon deal Anthropic refused
FCC Chairman Carr criticized Anthropic, called refusal 'a mistake'
Creates government-granted AI monopoly for OpenAI in defense
Anthropic filed lawsuit March 6 challenging designation under Administrative Procedure Act
Sam Altman admitted Pentagon deal timing 'looked opportunistic and sloppy'
OpenAI negotiated surveillance limits in amended deal
stories.last_known_state: Legal challenge filed March 6. First US company to sue over national security AI designation. Consumer migration to Claude continues despite Pentagon pressure. OpenAI credibility damaged by Altman admission.

stories.headline: Iran War Continues; Succession Crisis Underway; Strait of Hormuz Closed
key_facts: Joint U.S.-Israeli airstrikes Feb 28 killed Khamenei and 5+ senior officials
Trump stated campaign could take 'four weeks or less'
Iran retaliated with missiles on Kuwait, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Israel
6 civilians killed in Beit Shemesh
Iran closed Strait of Hormuz (20% of global oil)
Iran struck Amazon data centers in UAE and Bahrain
Senate rejected war powers resolution 47-53
Container ship hit by projectile in Strait, engine fire
Interim Leadership Council assumed transitional authority
Mojtaba Khamenei (son) reported as frontrunner for Supreme Leader
WTI crude surged past $90/barrel (35% weekly gain)
Brent crude above $94/barrel
VLCC freight rates hit $423,736/day (94% increase)
Trump demanded 'unconditional surrender' from Iran
60% domestic opposition to war in polling
Democrats warn of depleted weapons stockpiles
stories.last_known_state: War continues with unclear endgame. Succession crisis underway. Strait closure holding. Oil above $90. VLCC freight at record highs. 60% domestic opposition. No de-escalation signals.

stories.headline: China's EAST Tokamak Breaks 70-Year Fusion Engineering Barrier
key_facts: Achieved stable plasma 50% above Greenwald limit using PWSO theory
Published in Science Advances
Transforms fusion from physics problem to engineering problem
stories.last_known_state: Breakthrough published. No commercial timeline announced yet.

stories.headline: Nvidia Posts Record $68.1B Quarterly Revenue
key_facts: Q4 FY2026: $68.1B revenue (73% YoY)
Full year: $215.9B
Data center: $197.3B annually
Gross margins: 75%
Q1 guidance: $78B
Supply commitments: $95.2B
stories.last_known_state: Earnings reported. Market digesting. Q1 guidance strong.

stories.headline: Apple-Google Gemini Partnership Signals End of 'Build Alone' AI Era
key_facts: Apple paying Google ~$1B/year for Gemini
Gemini to power Apple Intelligence features
Reimagined Siri launching March 2026 with iOS 26.4
stories.last_known_state: Partnership announced. Siri relaunch expected March 2026.

stories.headline: Experience Economy Replaces Ownership — With Class Divide Underneath
key_facts: 35% spending priority now travel/experiences
24% of workforce paycheck-to-paycheck
Wage divergence: 1% lower-income vs 4% higher-income growth
TikTok Shop: $500M in 4 days
Livestream shopping: $50B projected U.S. 2026
stories.last_known_state: Trend analysis. No single triggering event.

stories.headline: OpenAI Closes Record $110B Funding Round
key_facts: Amazon $50B, SoftBank $30B, Nvidia $30B
$730B valuation
Largest private funding round in history
stories.last_known_state: Round closed. Deployment of capital underway.

stories.headline: China's 15th Five-Year Plan Emphasizes AI Leadership and Technological Sovereignty
key_facts: NPC convened March 5
GDP target 4.5-5%
Emphasis on 'technological self-reliance'
Direct response to U.S. supply chain restrictions
'Technological sovereignty' and 'strategic security' as explicit framing
Xi positions as 'bridging' plan toward 2035 modernization
Unchanged 4% fiscal deficit ratio, 2% CPI target, 5.5% urban unemployment ceiling
AI mentioned 50+ times in plan
Sweeping 'AI+ action plan' to integrate AI across industries
Quantum computing designated as strategic technology
Shift from cheap labor to 'new productive forces'
First-ever Law on National Development Plans being adopted
stories.last_known_state: Plan finalized with AI as central strategic priority. 50+ AI mentions. Quantum computing designated strategic. Specific budget allocations expected April-May.

stories.headline: Trump Tariffs Escalate to 15% Global; 24 States Sue; $130B Refunds Ordered
key_facts: Section 122 invocation, 150-day validity
Exemptions: critical minerals, energy, pharma, aerospace, USMCA goods
10% on Canada/Mexico effective March 4
China tariffs raised from 10% to 20% effective March 4
USMCA auto exemptions until April 2
S&P 500 fell 1.8% on March 3
Nasdaq-100 declined 2.6%
Global tariff rate increased from 10% to 15%
24 states sued to block tariffs March 5
Federal judge ordered $130B+ in refunds to companies
Canada implemented CA$29.8B retaliatory tariffs effective March 13
Mexico signaling similar retaliatory measures
25% auto tariffs effective April 3 announced
Supreme Court struck down 'Liberation Day' tariffs in February
stories.last_known_state: Tariffs now at 15% global. Legal cascade: 24 states suing, $130B refunds ordered. Canada/Mexico retaliating. USMCA auto exemptions expire April 2. Auto tariffs April 3. Trade war escalating to mutual destruction.

stories.headline: KOSPI Rebounds 9.63% After Historic 12.06% Crash
key_facts: KOSPI dropped 12.06% March 4, eclipsing 9/11 record
18% two-day decline
Triggered by Iran's Strait of Hormuz closure and oil spike
Forced margin liquidations of Samsung, SK Hynix, LG
DFM down 4.7% on reopening
Rebounded 9.63% March 5 (best day since 2008)
Samsung and SK Hynix gained >10% in recovery
KOSPI remains up 20%+ YTD and 100%+ over 12 months
stories.last_known_state: Rebounded after historic crash. Institutional conviction that crash was buying opportunity. Concentration risk remains in Samsung/SK Hynix.

stories.headline: NVIDIA Invests $2B in Coherent for AI Data Center Optics
key_facts: $2B direct investment plus multibillion purchase commitment
Silicon photonics for optical interconnects in AI data centers
Addresses optical interconnect bottleneck for AI infrastructure
20-year relationship between companies
stories.last_known_state: Investment announced. Targets AI infrastructure resilience amid supply chain disruptions.

stories.headline: Apple M5 MacBook Air and iPhone 17e Launch
key_facts: MacBook Air M5: 4x AI performance, $1,099, 512GB base
iPhone 17e: $599, A19 chip, 48MP, 1M token on-device context
Pre-orders March 4, availability March 11
Signals shift from cloud to on-device AI processing
stories.last_known_state: Pre-orders live. Availability March 11.

stories.headline: Senate Rejects War Powers Resolution on Iran 47-53
key_facts: Bipartisan resolution by Kaine (D-VA) and Paul (R-KY) rejected
Only Rand Paul crossed party lines
Trump can continue military operations without congressional authorization
Kaine promised subsequent votes 'every two weeks'
stories.last_known_state: Resolution failed. Executive military authority unchecked. Kaine promises repeat votes.

stories.headline: The Psychology of Shrinkflation: Why Smaller Packages Sell More
key_facts: Smaller packages paradoxically increase unit purchases
Loss-aversion psychology: smaller portion = compromise, price increase = deprivation
Hits hardest at lower incomes
Traditional inflation metrics don't capture portion-based erosion
stories.last_known_state: Trend analysis / deep dive. Behavioral design pattern in consumer markets.

stories.headline: Gen Z Rejects Aspirational Consumer Narrative
key_facts: Gen Z rejecting purchase-as-self-improvement premise
80% consumers prioritize value; quality/service drives retention
Top-third earners drive 50%+ spending, obsess over value
61% Gen Z prefers in-store discovery
'2026 is new 2016' TikTok searches up 425% — algorithm fatigue
stories.last_known_state: Trend analysis. Structural shift in consumer psychology.

stories.headline: Fentanyl Vaccine Enters First Human Trials
key_facts: Phase 1 trial in Netherlands, ~40 participants
Antibodies blocked 98% of fentanyl from crossing blood-brain barrier
Inverts addiction treatment model: prevention vs treatment
stories.last_known_state: Phase 1 trial underway. No new efficacy data. Safety assessment ongoing.

stories.headline: Neutrino CP Violation Evidence — Clue to Matter-Antimatter Imbalance
key_facts: NOvA + T2K collaboration found stronger evidence
Neutrinos and antineutrinos behave differently
Could explain why matter survived the Big Bang
stories.last_known_state: Evidence published. Fundamental physics discovery. No immediate practical application.

stories.headline: Pentagon Redirects $50B from Climate to Traditional Defense
key_facts: Hegseth ordered reallocation from climate programs
$866.6B base defense budget
Procurement +$14.4B, R&D +$3.9B
Emergency supplemental funding for munitions discussed due to Iran campaign
stories.last_known_state: Reallocation ordered. Supplemental spending discussions ongoing.

stories.headline: Oil Surges Past $90—Largest Weekly Gain Since 1983
key_facts: WTI crude broke $90/barrel
35% weekly gain—largest since futures trading began in 1983
Brent crude surged 30% to above $94/barrel
~20M barrels/day stranded in Persian Gulf
9M barrels/day off market due to attacks and shutdowns
Gasoline up 14% in one week to $3.41/gallon
VLCC freight rates hit $423,736/day (94% increase)
stories.last_known_state: Historic oil shock underway. Stagflation pricing in effect. Prolonged conflict could drive $100+ oil.

stories.headline: U.S. Jobs Report: -92K in February; Unemployment 4.4%
key_facts: Economy lost 92,000 jobs vs expected +50,000
Unemployment rose to 4.4% from 4.3%
Third monthly payroll decline in five months
Healthcare down 28K due to Kaiser Permanente strike
Average hourly earnings rose 0.4% monthly, 3.8% YoY
Creates textbook stagflation scenario with oil surge
stories.last_known_state: Stagflation fears rising. Fed rate cuts likely. Consumer confidence fragile.

stories.headline: Evo 2: AI Foundation Model Unlocks Genetic Design Across All Life
key_facts: Published in Nature, March 2026
Trained on 9 trillion DNA base pairs from 128,000+ species
Can design new genomes up to bacterial complexity
Predicts pathogenic mutations without task-specific fine-tuning
1M token context window for regulatory region analysis
Built by Arc Institute, NVIDIA, Stanford, UC Berkeley, UCSF
Biosecurity protocols excluded human pathogens
stories.last_known_state: Published in Nature. Paradigm shift for synthetic biology and drug discovery.

stories.headline: E-Shaped Economy: Wealth Inequality Fractured Into Three Classes
key_facts: Top 20% of households hold 72% of total wealth
Gini coefficient at 60-year highs
High-income consumers flooding discount retailers (TJ Maxx, Costco)
Lower-income households cutting back on essentials
Real consumer spending growth expected to slow to 1.5% in 2026
stories.last_known_state: Trend analysis. Three-class economy with inverted status signals.

stories.headline: Cursor Cloud Agents: 35% of Internal PRs Now AI-Generated
key_facts: Cloud Agents launched Feb 24 with isolated VMs
35% of Cursor's internal PRs created by agents
Agents can build, test, debug, deploy autonomously
First major production deployment of autonomous software development
stories.last_known_state: Production deployment confirmed. Phase transition from AI-assisted to AI-autonomous coding.

stories.headline: Authenticity as Luxury: AI Production Triggers Consumer Trust Crisis
key_facts: 26% of arts/design/entertainment tasks automatable by GenAI
Consumer confidence in news at record low 28%
Consumers developing skill at detecting AI slop
Human-made content becoming premium/luxury positioning
stories.last_known_state: Content economics inverting. Human authorship becoming scarce and valuable.

stories.headline: Gen Z 2016 Nostalgia as Economic Anxiety Signal
key_facts: 1.6M TikTok videos celebrating '2026 is the new 2016'
Search volume spiked 450% in early January
Not aesthetic nostalgia—mourning affordability of pre-2016 internet
2016 was last year of genuinely cheap digital services
Correlates with tariff announcements and geopolitical shock
stories.last_known_state: Deep dive topic for March 7 briefing. Cultural signal of economic precarity.

stories.headline: BlackRock's $26B Private Credit Fund Caps Withdrawals
key_facts: HLEND capped redemptions at 5% after 9.3% requested
Investors got $620M of $1.2B requested
First gate closure at mega-cap private credit fund
Stock fell 7% on announcement
Signals stress in $2T+ alternative credit market
stories.last_known_state: First gate closure signals illiquidity stress. Watch for cascade to other BDCs/credit funds.

stories.headline: 24 States Sue to Block Trump's Section 122 Tariffs
key_facts: NY AG Letitia James led 23 other states filing suit March 5
Challenges tariffs under Section 122 of Trade Act of 1974
Section 122 designed for gold-standard-era monetary imbalances, never previously invoked
Supreme Court struck down 'Liberation Day' tariffs in February
Federal judge ordered $130B+ in refunds for prior overpayments
stories.last_known_state: Legal cascade testing presidential tariff authority. Outcome defines scope of executive trade power.

stories.headline: Canada and Mexico Impose Major Retaliatory Tariffs
key_facts: Canada implemented CA$29.8B retaliatory tariffs effective March 13
PM Carney: 'era of close economic integration with US has ended'
Mexico signaling similar retaliatory measures
USMCA framework under strain
25% auto tariffs effective April 3
stories.last_known_state: Trade war shifting to mutual escalation. USMCA framework threatened. Auto tariffs April 3 loom.

stories.headline: Kristi Noem Fired; Immigration Crackdown Accelerates
key_facts: Trump fired DHS Secretary Kristi Noem March 7
Stephen Miller-aligned successor positioned to accelerate enforcement
Signals doubling down on mass deportation agenda
stories.last_known_state: DHS leadership change signals acceleration of immigration enforcement.

stories.headline: Iran Succession Crisis: New Supreme Leader Timeline Unclear
key_facts: Khamenei confirmed killed Feb 28
Interim Leadership Council assumed transitional authority
Mojtaba Khamenei (son) reported as frontrunner
Formal announcement delayed due to ongoing war
First public mourning observed March 6
Succession expected within days but unpredictable
stories.last_known_state: Institutional vulnerability during active conflict. New leadership may change war posture.

stories.headline: LRG1 Protein Identified as Early Trigger of Diabetic Blindness
key_facts: UCL identified LRG1 as earliest driver of diabetic retinopathy
Drug targeting LRG1 in preclinical testing
Could enable prevention rather than management
Diabetic retinopathy is leading cause of blindness in working-age adults
stories.last_known_state: Published in Science Translational Medicine. Drug in preclinical testing.

stories.headline: Bronze Age Plague Found in 4,000-Year-Old Sheep
key_facts: Yersinia pestis found in domesticated sheep skeleton from Arkaim
First detection of Bronze Age plague in non-human host
Livestock were critical vectors for plague spread along trade routes
Published in Cell
stories.last_known_state: Published in Cell. Solves puzzle of pre-flea plague transmission.

stories.headline: First Sodium-Ion Battery EV Reaches Mass Production
key_facts: CATL/CHANGAN Nevo A06 with sodium-ion batteries
248-mile range, 80% charge in 15 minutes
Avoids lithium/cobalt supply constraints
Target market launch mid-2026
stories.last_known_state: Commercial product announced. Launch mid-2026.
